the diagram models a system with users, devices, configurations, alerts, and historical data.
users are associated with devices and can configure them.
users can signal alerts and collect historical data.
the system appears to track device configurations, including water, temperature, soil humidity, and luminosity.

flow 1: accesso eseguito -> visualizzazione messaggio default -> almeno 1 serra associata (si) -> click "serre" -> visualizzazione elenco serre -> accesso eseguito
the diagram models a process for displaying a list of greenhouses after a user accesses the system.
the process first checks if at least one greenhouse is associated.
if no greenhouses are associated, the flow goes to click "serre".
if at least one greenhouse is associated, the user clicks "serre" and the list of greenhouses is displayed.
the flow then loops back to the beginning.

campo inserito correttamente -> operazione eseguita — type=control_flow; label="si"; explanation="positive outcome of validation"
campo inserito correttamente -> valore errato — type=control_flow; label="no"; explanation="negative outcome of validation"
valore errato -> click "add devices" — type=control_flow; label=""; explanation="loop back to re-enter data"
flow 1: accesso eseguito -> click "add devices" -> campo inserito correttamente (si) -> operazione eseguita
the diagram models the process of adding devices, likely within a system.
the flow starts with accessing the system and clicking "add devices".
a validation check ("campo inserito correttamente") determines whether the input is valid.
if the input is valid ("si"), the operation is executed.
if the input is invalid ("no"), the process loops back to the "click 'add devices'" step, prompting the user to re-enter the data.

campi inseriti correttamente -> operazione eseguita — type=control_flow; label="si"; explanation="if fields are correctly entered"
campi inseriti correttamente -> valore errato — type=control_flow; label="no"; explanation="if fields are not correctly entered"
valore errato -> click "configuration" — type=control_flow; label=""; explanation="return to configuration"
flow 1: accesso eseguito -> serra connessa -> click "configuration" -> campi inseriti correttamente (si) -> operazione eseguita
the diagram depicts a workflow for modifying greenhouse settings.
the process starts with accessing and connecting to the greenhouse.
the user then clicks the "configuration" button, which triggers a check for correct field input.
if the fields are entered correctly, the operation is executed. otherwise, the process returns to the "click configuration" step, allowing the user to re-enter the data.
the diagram focuses on the core logic of the configuration process and error handling.
